title: Vegan Cornbread
image_alt: Golden vegan cornbread cut into squares
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C). Lightly grease an 8×8 inch baking pan.
Whisk together the flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
Pour in the oat milk and canola oil. Stir until just well combined — don't overmix.
Pour batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top.
Bake for 20–25 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the centre comes out clean. Pairs great with Vegan Chili.
